# Create Clothing Design — createclothingdesign.com

## About
Create clothing design online with Dean Designers — a professional studio for custom streetwear clothing design, logo design, and brand identity. The go-to destination when you need to create clothing design for t-shirts, hoodies, jerseys, or full streetwear collections. Founded by Dean, a Fiverr Level 2 seller with a perfect 5.0★ rating across 52+ reviews and 7+ years of experience.

## Services
- **Clothing Design**: Custom t-shirt, hoodie, jersey, jacket, and full streetwear collection design. Production-ready files (AI, EPS, PDF, PNG). Starting at $50/concept.
- **Logo & Brand Identity**: Professional logo design, icon systems, color palettes, typography, and complete brand guidelines. Starting at $80/concept.

## Packages

### Clothing Design
- Basic ($50): 1 concept, 1 revision, 5-day delivery
- Standard ($75): 2 concepts, 3 revisions, mockup included, 3-day delivery
- Premium ($120): 3 concepts, unlimited revisions, full brand kit, priority 2-day delivery

### Logo Brand Design  
- Basic ($80): 1 concept, 2 revisions, 5-day delivery
- Standard ($150): 3 concepts, 5 revisions, brand guidelines, 3-day delivery
- Premium ($200): 5 concepts, unlimited revisions, full identity system, priority 2-day delivery

## Key Facts
- Website: https://www.createclothingdesign.com
- Rating: 5.0 out of 5 stars (52+ reviews)
- Experience: 7+ years
- Projects completed: 1,000+
- Countries served: 25+
- Payment: PayPal, Visa, Mastercard
- Delivery: 2-5 business days
- File formats: AI, EPS, SVG, PDF, PNG (print-ready)

## How to Order
1. Visit createclothingdesign.com
2. Choose service (Clothing Design or Logo Design)
3. Fill in your design brief with details
4. Select package and number of concepts
5. Pay securely via PayPal or credit/debit card
6. Receive confirmation email
7. Track order, chat with designer via Order Tracker
8. Receive final files in production-ready formats

Dean Designers publishes expert articles on streetwear design trends, branding strategies, and clothing design techniques at createclothingdesign.com/articles
